completed_confidence.evidence: Windows player output exists under EscapeFromNightmares/Build/Windows and contains EscapeFromNightmares.exe plus expected Unity runtime folders/files.
Headless generated-player smoke created a log and found no error-pattern matches, but the player was terminated after 15 seconds.
Unity discovers 9 concrete tests. EditMode 6/6 and PlayMode 3/3 passed.
Prior validation confirms required roots, runtime systems, UI surfaces, prefabs, StageDefinition, Build Settings, and generated build path.

basement_altar succeeds into event_front_door_key_appears, front_door_key_on_altar triggers event_final_chase_trigger, front_door requires front_door_key and triggers event_stage1_clear, and event_player_captured triggers GameOver.

remaining_tuning_gaps.evidence: Stage1InteractableDefinitions and Stage1HotspotSceneInstances validations explicitly record that hit areas are coarse 1280x720 placeholders and need art-accurate tuning.
remaining_tuning_gaps.recommended_next_action: Run an interactive hotspot pass room by room and adjust InteractableDefinition hitArea values only after confirming clickable affordances against the current room art.

remaining_tuning_gaps.evidence: MapRuntimeSystem contains 27 serialized marker coordinates seeded from approximate values; NEXT_ACTION and prior validations record marker tuning as incomplete.
remaining_tuning_gaps.recommended_next_action: Open the in-game map on each floor during playtest and adjust Stage1MapRuntimeSeeder marker positions where labels/markers are visually misleading.

remaining_tuning_gaps.evidence: Scene values are defaultHideSeconds=6, captureDecayPerSecond=0.25, nearCapturePressurePerSecond=0.08, and chaseCapturePressurePerSecond=0.22; HidingRuntimeSystem and MonsterRuntimeSystem phase records identify these as placeholder tuning values.
remaining_tuning_gaps.recommended_next_action: Run timed near-detection/chase/hiding scenarios and tune capture pressure, decay, and hide duration to avoid unfair deaths or trivial evasion.

remaining_tuning_gaps.evidence: Current PlayMode tests validate Stage1 load/runtime wiring but do not execute the full puzzle/item/event chain from child_room to basement_altar to front_door escape.
remaining_tuning_gaps.recommended_next_action: Add a deeper PlayMode flow test or manual scripted walkthrough for key item acquisition, puzzle success/failure events, final chase trigger, and front-door stage clear.

remaining_tuning_gaps.evidence: event_player_captured data exists and GameOverUI exists, but current smoke tests do not trigger capture, verify GameOver state/UI, or verify restart to child_room.
remaining_tuning_gaps.recommended_next_action: Add PlayMode coverage that invokes event_player_captured, checks GameOver state/UI, then exercises restart behavior.

remaining_tuning_gaps.evidence: Generated-player headless smoke started cleanly but required process termination and logged only early initialization.
remaining_tuning_gaps.recommended_next_action: Add an optional command-line smoke mode or player-side quit hook so build artifact validation can finish deterministically.

completion_decision.reason: The project has a generated Windows build and passing smoke tests, but Harness records still show intentional remaining work for hit-area tuning, map marker tuning, monster/hiding balance, full puzzle-chain confidence, game-over restart, and deterministic generated-player smoke coverage.

recommended_next_unit.scope: Add deeper Unity PlayMode tests for event_player_captured/game-over restart, final chase trigger, and stage-clear event flow before manual tuning.
